info.title: Seren Cloud
info.description: Deploy and operate hosted skills through seren-cloud.

get.summary: List tamper-evident audit entries for seren-cloud.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Max audit entries to return (default: 50, max: 200)

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Case-insensitive search across action, actor, and details

get.summary: Verify the tamper-evident audit chain.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Max audit entries to verify in sequence order (default: 10000, max: 100000)

get.summary: Get a single tamper-evident audit entry.

post.summary: Register a content-addressed deployment bundle before uploading raw bytes.

get.summary: Get deployment bundle metadata without raw content.

post.summary: Complete a direct-to-S3 upload for a registered deployment bundle.

get.summary: List all deployments for the authenticated organization.
Get details of a specific deployment.

delete.summary: Delete a deployment and clean up runtime resources.

patch.summary: Update config and/or secrets without redeploying code.

get.summary: List tamper-evident audit entries scoped to a deployment.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Max audit entries to return (default: 50, max: 200)

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Case-insensitive search across action, actor, and details

post.summary: Record a minimized external channel turn for a deployment.

get.summary: Get a short-lived direct download URL for a deployment runtime bundle.
Inspect the managed deployment filesystem within the state or artifacts namespace.

parameters.name: namespace
parameters.description: Namespace root to inspect: artifacts or state (default: artifacts)

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Relative path under the selected namespace root

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Max directory entries to return (default: 200, max: 1000)

get.summary: Read a byte range from the managed deployment filesystem.

parameters.name: namespace
parameters.description: Namespace root to inspect: artifacts or state (default: artifacts)

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Relative file path under the selected namespace root

get.summary: Read a UTF-8 text file from the managed deployment filesystem.

parameters.name: namespace
parameters.description: Namespace root to inspect: artifacts or state (default: artifacts)

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Relative file path under the selected namespace root

get.summary: Get logs for a deployment.

parameters.name: compute_backend
parameters.description: Filter by compute backend (aws_container, cloudflare_worker, daytona)

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Filter by run source (api, cli, scheduler, ui, system, unknown)

parameters.description: Filter runs started at/after RFC3339 timestamp

parameters.name: started_before
parameters.description: Filter runs started at/before RFC3339 timestamp

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Case-insensitive search across execution_id, status, source, run_name, output, metadata

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Repeat or comma-separate statuses: queued, running, awaiting_approval, completed, failed, cancelled, timeout, blocked, error

parameters.name: source

parameters.description: Filter runs started at/after RFC3339 timestamp

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Case-insensitive search across execution_id, status, source, run_name, output, metadata

get.summary: List structured output events emitted by a specific deployment run.

parameters.name: kind
parameters.description: Filter by event kind (text, thinking, tool_call_started, tool_call_completed, tool_audit, workflow, error, unknown)

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Case-insensitive search across event type, kind, item ID, and payload

200.description: Current pending approvals for the run

parameters.description: Active stream session ID to close

get.summary: Run a one-shot invocation of a deployment.

Stop an always-on deployment (scale to 0 replicas).

AgentAssetFile.description: Non-prompt file that belongs to an agent bundle.

content_type.description: Optional MIME type supplied by the caller.

oneOf.description: Optional caller-supplied purpose for UI grouping and runtime materialization.

sha256.description: Optional content digest for provenance. When present, the server verifies it.

AgentBundle.description: Authored agent bundle used by LLM workloads.

assets.description: Additional files available to the agent runtime.

instructions.description:
Prompt-bearing instruction files rendered server-side into the runtime
system prompt.

AgentInstructionFile.description:
One authored instruction file.

Supports inline instruction bodies as well as packaged workload metadata.

allowed_tools.description: Optional tool allowlist carried by skill metadata.

content.description: File body. Packaged workloads should provide the materialized instruction text.

path.description: Original or packaged path, when known.

sha256.description: Optional content digest for packaged workload provenance.

skill_name.description: Skill directory name, when the instruction came from a packaged skill.

AgentInstructionKind.description: Typed instruction-file kind for managed LLM workloads.

CloudDeploymentActionStatusResponse.description: Generic status payload used by cloud deployment lifecycle endpoints.

CloudDeploymentAlertEvent.description: Run-status event that can trigger a deployment alert webhook.

events.description: Run events that should trigger the webhook.

webhook_secret_key.description: Secret key whose value is the destination webhook URL.

CloudDeploymentBundle.description: Deployment bundle metadata without raw bundle content.

CloudDeploymentBundleDetail.description: Deployment bundle metadata plus current deployment references.

CloudDeploymentBundleDownloadResponse.description: Short-lived download instructions for a deployment's runtime bundle.

CloudDeploymentBundleSourceKind.description:
Deployment bundle artifact format.

This is intentionally a closed server-supported set. Add formats by
migration when Seren Cloud can validate and execute them.

CloudDeploymentEnvironment.description: Reusable execution environment profile for cloud deployments.

CloudDeploymentEvalGateStatus.description: Computed evaluation gate status for a deployment.

CloudDeploymentNetworkPolicy.description: Deployment-level outbound network restrictions for sandboxed execution backends.

allow_list.description: Explicit IPv4 CIDR ranges allowed for outbound access.

block_all.description: When true, block all outbound network access from the deployment runtime.

CloudDeploymentRunArtifact.description: Artifact emitted by a cloud run (for example PR links, plans, screenshots).

CloudDeploymentRunEvent.description: A single execution run event for a cloud deployment.

invocation_payload.description: Canonical JSON payload submitted to trigger the run.

output.description: Raw stdout/stderr output. Universal fallback for all backend types.

output_events.description:
Structured event trace for agentic executions (thinking, tool calls, text).
Null for non-agentic scripts that produce plain stdout/stderr.

CloudDeploymentRunInvocationResponse.description:
Response envelope for triggering a cloud deployment run.

This schema intentionally covers both synchronous and asynchronous responses
across compute backends (`always_on`, `cron`, Cloudflare, Daytona).

compute_cost_atomic.description: Atomic compute cost units when emitted by the backend.

execution_id.description: Backend execution ID for correlating orchestrator/job-level status.

execution_time_ms.description: Execution duration in milliseconds when available.

exit_code.description: Process exit code for runtimes that expose it (for example Daytona).

job_name.description: K8s Job name for queued cron executions.

run_id.description: Persisted run event ID when the invocation is tracked in the run history table.

script_name.description: Cloudflare Worker script name when applicable.

status.description: Lifecycle status reported by the backend (`queued`, `running`, `completed`, etc.).

CloudDeploymentRunRequest.description:
Request body for triggering a cloud deployment run.

Additional JSON fields are allowed and forwarded to the runtime.

approval_decisions.description: Optional approval decisions used when resuming a paused run checkpoint.

async.description: Whether to request async execution for always-on orchestrators.

resume_checkpoint_id.description: Optional checkpoint identifier used to resume an awaiting-approval run.

run_id.description: Optional client-provided run identifier (used by some orchestrators).

CloudDeploymentSummary.description: Summary view for listing deployments (excludes large fields like code_bundle).

active_revision_id.description: Current managed-agent revision, when this is a managed seren-agent deployment.

visibility.description: Visibility mode: "open" (default) or "opaque" (redacts selected details from non-owners).

CloudEvalCase.description: Reusable eval baseline captured from a run or created manually later.

CloudEvalCaseResult.description: Per-case result row captured when running an eval set.

CloudEvalCriteria.description: Durable pass/fail criteria for a seren-cloud eval set.

CloudEvalRun.description: Durable execution record for running an eval set against a deployment.

CloudEvalRunFailureExample.description: Representative failures attached to an eval run summary.

CloudEvalRunSummary.description: Roll-up summary for an eval run.

CloudEvalRunVerdict.description: Durable pass/fail verdict derived from an eval run and its criteria.

CloudEvalRunVerdictCheck.description: Individual threshold failure that contributed to an eval verdict.

CloudEvalSet.description: Durable grouping for reusable seren-cloud eval cases.

CloudEvalSetSchedule.description: Scheduler state for automatically executing a seren-cloud eval set.

CloudEvalSetScheduleRequest.description: Request body for enabling or updating scheduled eval execution.

CloudPendingApprovalRun.description: Awaiting-approval run entry returned by the approval inbox endpoints.

CloudRunApprovalDecision.description: Approval decision submitted when resuming an awaiting-approval run.

CloudRunApprovalDecisionValue.description: Normalized approval action accepted by the cloud resume API.

CloudRunEvalsResponse.description: Eval records linked to a run, either as the promoted source or as an actual replay target.

oneOf.description: Plain text output from the agent.
Result returned from a tool invocation.
Audit trail entry for a tool invocation that should be logged but not blocked.
An error that occurred during execution.

CloudRunOutputEvent.description:
A single event in the structured output trace.

Matches the seren-desktop `WorkerEvent` model for consistency.
Stored as a JSON array in `output_events`.

CloudRunOutputEventEnvelope.description: Envelope carrying structured output event metadata.

CloudRunOutputEventKind.description: Canonical taxonomy for structured run output events.

CloudRunPendingApproval.description: Pending approval attached to an `awaiting_approval` run.

CloudRunPendingApprovalsResponse.description: Current approval state for a run.

CloudRunReplayComparison.description: Comparison summary between two run replay captures.

CloudRunReplayEventMismatch.description: The first structured replay event that differs between two runs.

CloudRunReplayFieldComparison.description: Field-level replay/eval summary comparison between two runs.

CloudRunStreamCloseResponse.description: Response payload for explicitly closing an active run stream session.

CreateCloudDeploymentBundleRequest.description: Request body for registering a content-addressed deployment bundle.

sha256.description: Lowercase hex SHA-256 digest of the raw bundle bytes.

size_bytes.description: Exact raw bundle size in bytes.

CreateCloudDeploymentBundleResponse.description: Response returned when a deployment bundle is registered.

CreateCloudDeploymentEnvironmentRequest.description: Request body for creating a reusable execution environment.

CreateCloudDeploymentRequest.description:
Request body for creating a cloud deployment.

The deployment envelope (name, skill, mode, schedule, eval gate, dashboard,
alert policy, visibility, environment) is on the request itself; all
runtime concerns (execution strategy, compute backend, limits, secrets,
config, requirements, etc.) live inside the embedded `WorkloadSpec`.

cron_timezone.description: Timezone for cron schedules. Defaults to `UTC` when omitted.

dashboard_config.description: UI rendering hints for custom dashboards.

oneOf.description: Optional eval gate that must pass before runs proceed.

name.description: Human-readable deployment name. Auto-generated when omitted.

skill_slug.description: Stable slug identifying the skill being deployed.

workload.description: Runtime workload specification (execution strategy, compute, limits, ...).

CreateCloudEvalRunRequest.description: Request body for executing an eval set against a deployment.

CreateCloudEvalSetRequest.description: Request body for creating a seren-cloud eval set.

data.description: A single audit trail entry.
Generic status payload used by cloud deployment lifecycle endpoints.
Deployment bundle metadata without raw bundle content.
Deployment bundle metadata plus current deployment references.
Short-lived download instructions for a deployment's runtime bundle.
Reusable execution environment profile for cloud deployments.
A single execution run event for a cloud deployment.

invocation_payload.description: Canonical JSON payload submitted to trigger the run.

output.description: Raw stdout/stderr output. Universal fallback for all backend types.

output_events.description:
Structured event trace for agentic executions (thinking, tool calls, text).
Null for non-agentic scripts that produce plain stdout/stderr.

data.description:
Response envelope for triggering a cloud deployment run.

This schema intentionally covers both synchronous and asynchronous responses
across compute backends (`always_on`, `cron`, Cloudflare, Daytona).

compute_cost_atomic.description: Atomic compute cost units when emitted by the backend.

execution_id.description: Backend execution ID for correlating orchestrator/job-level status.

execution_time_ms.description: Execution duration in milliseconds when available.

exit_code.description: Process exit code for runtimes that expose it (for example Daytona).

job_name.description: K8s Job name for queued cron executions.

run_id.description: Persisted run event ID when the invocation is tracked in the run history table.

script_name.description: Cloudflare Worker script name when applicable.

status.description: Lifecycle status reported by the backend (`queued`, `running`, `completed`, etc.).

data.description: Summary view for listing deployments (excludes large fields like code_bundle).

active_revision_id.description: Current managed-agent revision, when this is a managed seren-agent deployment.

visibility.description: Visibility mode: "open" (default) or "opaque" (redacts selected details from non-owners).

data.description: Reusable eval baseline captured from a run or created manually later.
Per-case result row captured when running an eval set.
Durable execution record for running an eval set against a deployment.
Durable grouping for reusable seren-cloud eval cases.
Eval records linked to a run, either as the promoted source or as an actual replay target.
Current approval state for a run.
Comparison summary between two run replay captures.
Response payload for explicitly closing an active run stream session.
Response returned when a deployment bundle is registered.
Aggregated spend summary for a single cloud deployment.

items.description: Reusable execution environment profile for cloud deployments.
Artifact emitted by a cloud run (for example PR links, plans, screenshots).
A single execution run event for a cloud deployment.

invocation_payload.description: Canonical JSON payload submitted to trigger the run.

output.description: Raw stdout/stderr output. Universal fallback for all backend types.

output_events.description:
Structured event trace for agentic executions (thinking, tool calls, text).
Null for non-agentic scripts that produce plain stdout/stderr.

items.description: Summary view for listing deployments (excludes large fields like code_bundle).

active_revision_id.description: Current managed-agent revision, when this is a managed seren-agent deployment.

visibility.description: Visibility mode: "open" (default) or "opaque" (redacts selected details from non-owners).

items.description: Reusable eval baseline captured from a run or created manually later.
Per-case result row captured when running an eval set.
Durable execution record for running an eval set against a deployment.
Durable grouping for reusable seren-cloud eval cases.
Awaiting-approval run entry returned by the approval inbox endpoints.
Envelope carrying structured output event metadata.

data.description: Result of verifying the audit chain integrity.

DeploymentSpendSummary.description: Aggregated spend summary for a single cloud deployment.

EvalGate.description: Eval gate configuration that must pass with a fresh verdict before runs proceed.

OrchestrationMode.description:
Cloud deployment orchestration mode.

`Script` (default): container runs user code directly (existing behavior).
`Llm`: container runs the seren-orchestrator LLM tool-calling loop.

count.description: Number of items in this response

has_more.description: Whether there are more items after this page

total.description: Total number of items across all pages

PromoteRunToCloudEvalCaseRequest.description: Request body for promoting a run into a reusable eval case.

RequirementSource.description: Where a deployment requirement should be satisfied from.

RequirementSpec.description: A declared requirement for a cloud deployment (validated at deploy time).

SideEffectPolicy.description: Deployment-level safety controls for mutating built-in publisher calls.

ToolApprovalCondition.description: Condition for a conditional approval rule.

ToolApprovalRule.description: Conditional approval rule for an orchestration tool.

ToolApprovalType.description: Approval policy for an LLM orchestration tool.

ToolDefinition.description: A single tool definition for LLM orchestration.

max_output_bytes.description: Maximum output size in bytes for this tool. Output exceeding this limit is truncated.

timeout_override_seconds.description: Per-tool timeout override in seconds. Overrides the deployment-level tool timeout.

UpdateCloudDeploymentEnvironmentRequest.description: Request body for updating a reusable execution environment.

UpdateCloudDeploymentRequest.description:
Partial update request for an existing cloud deployment.

Mirrors the deployment envelope as `Option<...>` for partial update. Runtime
workload changes use deployment-specific replacement/update endpoints.

clear_eval_gate.description: Clear any existing eval gate configuration.

UpdateCloudEvalSetRequest.description: Request body for replacing a seren-cloud eval set.

VerificationResult.description: Result of verifying the audit chain integrity.

oneOf.description: LLM-orchestrated agent with optional tool definitions and model config.
Runtime adapter used to run the agent loop.

bundle.description: Authored instruction and asset files for the LLM agent.

fallback_models.description: Ordered list of fallback model identifiers tried on primary failure.

oneOf.description: LLM connection override for private-model routing.

model_config.description: Arbitrary model parameters forwarded to the provider.

tool_definitions.description: Tool definitions available to the LLM during execution.

oneOf.description: Code workload deployed from a content-addressed deployment bundle.

deployment_bundle_id.description: Uploaded deployment bundle identifier returned by `seren_cloud_create_deployment_bundle`.

requirements_txt.description: Python requirements.txt contents injected at build time.

oneOf.description: Runtime kind (language/format) for the deployment bundle.

WorkloadExecution.description:
Execution strategy for a workload.

Tagged on the `type` field so the wire shape is `{"type":"llm",...}` or
`{"type":"code",...}`.

WorkloadLimits.description:
Resource and iteration limits applied to a workload run.

All fields default to `None` (no limit).

context_budget_tokens.description: Maximum context window budget in tokens.

max_iterations.description: Maximum number of agent loop iterations before the run is terminated.

max_timeout_seconds.description: Wall-clock timeout in seconds for the entire run.

max_tool_calls_per_run.description: Maximum number of tool calls across the entire run.

max_tool_output_chars.description: Maximum number of characters kept from any single tool output.

WorkloadSpec.description:
Full runtime specification for a cloud workload.

Captures compute backend, network policy, side-effect controls, and the
execution discriminator. The `execution` field is required; all other
fields default to `None` or their zero value.

oneOf.description: Compute backend override. Uses the deployment default when absent.

config.description: Arbitrary operator-supplied configuration passed to the runtime.

execution.description: Execution strategy -- either LLM-orchestrated or artifact-bundle backed.

limits.description: Resource and iteration limits for the workload.

oneOf.description: Outbound network restrictions for sandboxed backends.

publisher_only.description: When true, the workload is exposed only through publisher-managed entry points.

requirements.description: Declared requirements validated at deploy time.

secrets.description: Secret references available to the runtime (typed in a later milestone).

oneOf.description: Controls for mutating built-in publisher calls.
